This game is really fun, mainly because I get to beat people with a hammer as a one toothed toddler. But one thing that I don’t like is that you have to grab to move. Can you make it so you can move like gorilla tag? Of so. Please respond soon. 

Sincerely, goofy dude. ￼

The game is currently in early access and shows potential. I noticed a response to a comment that many of my concerns would be addressed in future updates. However, I find the AI-generated cover art uninspiring, which gives the impression that the developers are rushing the release for a quick profit. (Yes, it's free, but I hope I can convey what I mean.) I suggest hiring a designer to create original artwork or, at the very least, capturing screenshots and editing them with Photoshop or similar software.

All right this game is awesome. I’ve been wanting a game like this for a while now I love the storyline. I love how you just added a level and it’s cool but this is just one complaint I have whenever you unalive the family and you go into the van, it doesn’t beat the level so for level one police are just infinitely spawning and it won’t let you win the level and then for level two it’s just a giant empty house and you can’t win the level other than that though this game is great ￼

developer_response.body: Thank you for your input, in the next update I will fix this by allowing you to end the level by entering the van again!
